modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty replying to a discussion thread on D2L.

full_description_text: 
The user was trying to engage in a discussion thread on D2L but couldn't figure out how to reply. They seemed a bit confused about the process and were looking for guidance. It’s important for them to participate, so any help would be appreciated!
